title: Simple Solution Pet Carpet Freshener with Enzymatic Cleaning Granules - 500g
features: ODOUR REMOVAL: Effectively eliminates pet odours trapped in carpets and upholstery.
Ease of Use: Just sprinkle the granules and vacuum thoroughly for a quick clean.
PET-SAFE FORMULA: Contains Pro-bacteria designed to be safe for pets while neutralising odours.
PLEASANT FRAGRANCE: Infused with a Spring Breeze scent for a fresh and clean smelling home.
Convenient: An ideal solution for odour control when there’s no time for shampooing carpets.

No, our Pet Carpet Freshener is formulated to remove odours without residue or discolouration Is it safe for pets to walk on? Our Pet Carpet Freshener is safe to use around pets and children when used as directed. Make sure to vacuum thoroughly after use What can I use it on? Pet Carpet Freshener is safe to use on carpets, furniture and upholstery. For best results, test on a small area first Does it cover up bad smells? No, our Pet Carpet Freshener contains friendly pro-bacteria which completely break down the source of the bad smells, leaving a clean fresh spring breeze scent
